description: Happy path: beginner renter-friendly project with full inputs returns reversible steps with safety notes and broll tags

input.project_title: Moody peel-and-stick accent wall behind a thrifted headboard

expect.project_title: Moody peel-and-stick accent wall behind a thrifted headboard
expect.estimated_time_per_step: present, includes range with 'to' and a caveat about variation
expect.steps[].action: present, imperative voice, one discrete action per step
expect.steps[].detail: present, explains why the step matters
expect.warnings: array, may be empty or contain project-level safety notes

prohibit: permanent or irreversible methods when renter_friendly is true
fabricated product names, cure times, or brand specifications
em dashes in action or detail text
steps involving drilling, painting permanent surfaces, or wall damage

description: Minimal inputs: intermediate project with only required fields, renter_friendly defaults to false

input.project_title: Dark-stained vintage dresser flip with new brass hardware

expect.project_title: Dark-stained vintage dresser flip with new brass hardware
expect.steps[].safety_note: present on steps involving sanding, staining, or chemical products; null only when no hazard exists
expect.steps[].broll_tag: present and descriptive for every non-licensed-trade step

prohibit: fabricated drying times or cure rates

description: Edge case: project containing one step that requires a licensed trade triggers the hard boundary flag

input.project_title: Vintage pendant light installation over kitchen island with new dimmer switch wiring

expect.steps: array containing at least one entry with licensed_trade_required true
expect.steps[licensed_trade_required=true].acti: contains the hard boundary note about licensed professional required
expect.warnings: non-empty array with project-level safety flags

prohibit: DIY wiring or electrical instructions for licensed-trade steps
fabricated electrical specifications or code references
